segments: : مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ السَّجْدَهِ فِی کُلِّ لَیْلَهِ جُمُعَهٍ أَعْطَاهُ اللَّهُ کِتابَهُ بِیَمِینِهِ* وَ لَمْ یُحَاسِبْهُ بِمَا کَانَ مِنْهُ وَ کَانَ مِنْ رُفَقَاءِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَیْتِهِ ص.
arabic.text: : مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ السَّجْدَهِ فِی کُلِّ لَیْلَهِ جُمُعَهٍ أَعْطَاهُ اللَّهُ کِتابَهُ بِیَمِینِهِ* وَ لَمْ یُحَاسِبْهُ بِمَا کَانَ مِنْهُ وَ کَانَ مِنْ رُفَقَاءِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَیْتِهِ ص.

segments: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites it on Friday eve, Allah would bestow him His scroll of deeds in his right hand, and account will not be taken of what he had done, and he will be of the companions of Muhammad and his Ahle Bayt (a.s.).”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites it on Friday eve, Allah would bestow him His scroll of deeds in his right hand, and account will not be taken of what he had done, and he will be of the companions of Muhammad and his Ahle Bayt (a.s.).”

narratorChain.raw: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ
